zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Kellet III於1182年出生在英國藍卡爾奧維 凱萊特時，他的父親Adam de Kellet II28歲，母親Matilda of Singleton25歲。他於1225年之前與Maude結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1236年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧維 凱萊特享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kellet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Kellett
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Nether or Over Kellet in Lancashire or Kelleth in Cumbria, named from Old Norse kelda ‘spring’ + hlíth ‘slope’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Kellet III was born in 1182, in Over Kellet, Lancashire, England, his father, Adam de Kellet II, was 28 and his mother, Matilda of Singleton, was 25. He married Maude before 1225. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1236, in Over Kellet, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Kellet III est né en 1182, à Over Kellet, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Kellet II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Matilda of Singleton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Maude avant 1225. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1236, à Over Kellet, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Kellet III 1182 in Over Kellet, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Kellet II 28 und seine Mutter Matilda of Singleton 25. Er hat vor 1225 Maude geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1236 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Over Kellet, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Kellet III è nato il nel 1182 nel Over Kellet, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Adam de Kellet II, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Matilda of Singleton, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Maude prima del 1225. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1236, nel Over Kellet, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Kellet IIIが1182年にイギリスランカシュアイアオバー ケレットで生まれた時，父Adam de Kellet IIは28歳，母Matilda of Singletonは25歳であった。1225年以前にMaudeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1236年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオバー ケレットで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Kellet III(이)가 1182년 영국 랭카실르 버 켈렛에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Kellet II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda of Singleton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1225년 이전 Maude(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1236년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 버 켈렛에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Kellet III nasceu em 1182, em Over Kellet, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Kellet II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Matilda of Singleton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Maude antes 1225. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1236, em Over Kellet, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Kellet III родился в 1182 г. в местности овир келлет, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam de Kellet II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda of Singleton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude перед 1225 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1236 г. в местности овир келлет, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Kellet III nació en 1182, en Over Kellet, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Kellet II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Matilda of Singleton, tenía 25 años.
